selection_policy: For each paper Lite repository, choose the instance with the fewest F2P+P2P references among official GPT-4 resolved instances. If the run has no resolved instance for that repository, choose the minimum over all Lite instances. Break ties by gold-patch bytes then instance ID.
transport_policy: process-scoped Git HTTP/1.1; no global Git mutation

environment_compatibility: public off-host redirect dependency replaced by local cross-host semantic validation

attempt_history.reason: Classic conda environment solve exceeded the preregistered safety threshold of 1 GiB available memory.
